summary: Made a surgical exit adjustment so the chapter hands off into the lodge-room opening of the next chapter without repeating the same cot-and-bundle action. The opening was left intact because its construction already differs from the visible adjacent opening, and no style-bible example lines were present to replace.
edits: Reworked the final paragraph's first beat to avoid duplicating the next chapter's opening action.
Added a small note of Nura going still by the wall to smooth the emotional handoff into the next scene.
Left the opening unchanged because it was already structurally distinct from the visible neighboring opening.
